<!-- Generated from clap definitions by mistralrs-cli docgen. Do not edit. -->

Remove a prebuilt install

```
mistralrs uninstall [OPTIONS]
```

| Option | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `-y, --yes` | `false` | Skip the confirmation prompt |
